creator: mdsl21@gmail.com
text:
When i tried to import map in MapInfo TAB format the interface of GRASS GIS (written in tcl/tk) fall down to core. There are no any errors messages. I dont know what was happened. In my home directory i found core file. The map layer is very simple: 10-20 polygonal objects, 30-50 vertex per each object... GRASS and tcl/tk was installed from fresh ports... Please, help! :)

Fix: 

Sorry, i dont know.
How-To-Repeat: Try to import map in MapInfo TAB format.
